blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 66 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
